mechanism: Deteriorating consumer sentiment marks down expected consumer spending, compressing earnings multiples for discretionary sector stocks.

mechanism: Weakened consumer outlook raises perceived household credit risk, pushing mortgage originators to demand higher spreads over Treasuries.

mechanism: Sentiment-driven deferral of big-ticket purchases hits auto sales first given the size of the financial commitment relative to income.
